name: dev-squad-marketplace
description: Marketplace for dev-squad agent swarm plugin

plugins.name: dev-squad
plugins.description: Ship full-stack projects autonomously with 11 coordinated AI agents. 9-phase pipeline with anti-AI-slop UI design gate, 3-way code review, and pre-seeded .claude/ self-docs. SaaS scope (BETA) — Phase 0 runs 10-question intake covering market, admin hierarchy, role model, trial+plan, self-service auth, customer API, email lifecycle, invoice, operational readiness, and compliance jurisdiction to prevent post-implementation retrofits.
